headlines.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
headlines.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

headlines.title: The 40 minutes when the Artemis crew loses contact with the Earth
headlines.description: As the astronauts pass behind the Moon they will experience a moment of silence and solitude as communication with the Earth is blocked.

headlines.title: Benefits and pensions rise as two-child cap ends
headlines.description: Families on some benefits with three or more children will get an average rise of £4,100 a year.

headlines.title: Don't put off treatment during doctors' strike, NHS tells patients
headlines.description: The strike comes at the end of the bank holiday weekend and NHS managers fear demand could be "challenging".

headlines.title: Northern Ireland becomes first in UK to give parents two weeks paid leave for miscarriage
headlines.description: Northern Ireland becomes first part of UK to bring in legal entitlement for parents affected by miscarriage at any stage of a pregnancy to have paid leave.

headlines.title: Pepsi withdraws as UK festival sponsor after Kanye West backlash
headlines.description: Sir Keir Starmer says it is "deeply concerning" the rapper is set to headline a festival after recent antisemitic comments.

headlines.title: Hungary alleges plot to blow up gas pipeline ahead of election
headlines.description: The incident comes a week before the polls, and follow warnings of a potential operations staged to influence voters.

headlines.title: Disability benefits change means my son could lose £200 a month - it's terrifying
headlines.description: Charities say families are facing financial worries as changes to disability benefits come into effect.

headlines.title: Families battle to reclaim thousands of pounds owed by care operator investigated by BBC
headlines.description: Relatives say it has taken months, and in some cases years, to get back money owed by a care home operator.

headlines.title: Family 'utterly devastated' after boy, 13, killed in crash as two charged
headlines.description: Noah Campbell's family say he was a "talented, versatile sportsman" who was "incredibly well-liked".

headlines.title: Oil prices choppy after expletive-laden Trump threat to Iran
headlines.description: Brent crude rose above $110 before those gains eased after a report of US-Iran talks over a potential ceasefire.

headlines.title: 'We are at the edge of a battlefield': BBC reports near Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The BBC's Orla Guerin travels to the edge of the critical waterway that Iran has put a stranglehold on.

headlines.title: Trump declares victory in Iran war after rescue, but threats to US operation still loom
headlines.description: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.

headlines.title: How China fell for a lobster: What an AI assistant tells us about Beijing's ambition
headlines.description: The AI agent sparked a frenzy of "raising lobsters" in March, with users training the tool to suit their needs.

headlines.title: 'I adore her now': Mother learns to cope with child's autism in a country with little help
headlines.description: Malawian Martha Ongwane, brought low by her daughter's autism, found a rare support group.

headlines.title: The Papers: Trump's 'expletive-laden tirade' and US airman's 'got gun' miracle escape
headlines.description: The majority of the papers lead with Donald Trump's latest threat to Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Streetwear and crop tops take football fashion to new heights
headlines.description: Inspired by football culture on and off the pitch, this year's World Cup kit collections mix archive classics with streetwear staples.

headlines.title: Apple at 50: Three products that changed how we live - and three that really didn't
headlines.description: On the tech giant's 50th year, we ask analysts to give their top three Apple successes and misses

headlines.title: Artemis II astronauts have toilet trouble on their way towards the Moon
headlines.description: The four astronauts aboard the Artemis II mission's Orion capsule have encountered intermittent complications with their spacecraft's toilet.

headlines.title: New youth clubs for anti-social behaviour hotspots
headlines.description: The government has announced eight young futures hubs in areas with high anti-social behaviour.

headlines.title: Missiles thrown at police as illegal rave halted
headlines.description: Dorset Police said the event drew about 2,000 people and more than 100 vehicles.

headlines.title: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.

headlines.title: Seven arrested at RAF base demo accused of supporting Palestine Action
headlines.description: Five men and two women at a peace camp at RAF Lakenheath are held on suspicion of supporting Palestine Action.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The ‘Not Fit For Purpose’ Department - Part 3
headlines.description: Covering the Home Office.

headlines.title: Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star in an award-winning musical
headlines.description: Exploring the joy and pain of pursuing your dreams

headlines.title: Totti, Puyol, Maldini, Carragher - ranking football's greatest one-club men
headlines.description: From Francesco Totti to Matthew Le Tissier, one-club men share a rare and special bond with the fans - we've ranked the top 10 here.

headlines.title: Depression fears drove Orie's retirement decision
headlines.description: Delicious Orie discusses his shock decision to retire from boxing and why he wants to be a role model for the younger generation.

headlines.title: Lijnders hints at Man City departure for  Silva
headlines.description: Manchester City assistant manager Pep Lijnders hints that midfielder Bernardo Silva could be leaving in the summer.

headlines.title: Why it's time for Rose to come of age at Masters
headlines.description: In the field for this week's 90th Masters there will be no player seeking a first Augusta crown with a better pedigree than Justin Rose, writes Iain Carter.

headlines.title: Female coaches make huge difference - Scarratt
headlines.description: More female coaches would be "huge" for women's rugby, says new Red Roses coach Emily Scarratt.

headlines.title: Is the Championship heading for financial 'catastrophe'?
headlines.description: BBC Sport takes a look at if the second tier could be facing a "doomsday scenario" as club accounts reveal the significant scale of their losses.

headlines.title: Dubois outpoints bloodied Harper to unify titles
headlines.description: Caroline Dubois floored Terri Harper before outpointing her British rival to become the unified lightweight world champion in London.
